search_parameters.q: For the college named 'Kumaraguru College of Technology', located in India (Coimbatore), provide the latest verified infrastructure details and available scholarships. Use only official college website, latest NIRF submissions, AICTE disclosures, or verified education portals. Return only valid JSON with: {"guessed_data": false, "sources_verified": ["source URL or document name"], "infrastructure": [{"facility": "facility name", "details": "facility details"}], "hostel_details": {"available": boolean, "total_capacity": integer, "type": "hostel type"}, "library_details": {"total_books": integer, "journals": integer, "e_resources": integer, "area_sqft": real_number}, "transport_details": {"buses": integer, "routes": integer}, "scholarships": [{"name": "scholarship name", "amount": real_number_or_NA, "currency_type": "INR", "eligibility": "eligibility criteria", "provider": "provider name", "type": "merit/need/specific", "application_deadline": "date_or_NA"}]}. IMPORTANT: Always include currency_type field for all monetary amounts. List ALL available scholarships including merit-based, need-based, government, private, and international student scholarships. Do not return any extra text, only JSON.

text_blocks.snippet: {"guessed_data": false,"sources_verified": ["https://kct.ac.in/","https://kct.ac.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Mandatory-Disclosure-2024-25.pdf","https://kct.ac.in/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/NTTM-TENDER-2025.pdf","https://www.nirfindia.org/Rankings/2025/EngineeringRanking200.html","http://simplicity.in/v1/coimbatore/english/news/131202/kumaraguru-mahatma-gandhi-merit-scholarship-2026-coimbatore","https://www.collegedekho.com/colleges/kumaraguru-college-of-technology/ranking","https://www.shiksha.com/college/kumaraguru-college-of-technology-coimbatore-47886/infrastructure"],"infrastructure": [{"facility": "Library","details": "Central library with 60,000+ books, 800+ systems in computer center, high-speed Wi-Fi, digital resources"},{"facility": "Laboratories","details": "Well-equipped, hi-tech labs for mechanical, mechatronics, and other engineering departments"},{"facility": "Hostel","details": "On-campus residential facilities with vegetarian food and gymnasiums"},{"facility": "Sports Complex","details": "Various sports grounds and coaching staff"},{"facility": "Auditorium","details": "Modern auditorium and seminar halls for events"},{"facility": "Medical Services","details": "On-campus medical center"}],"hostel_details": {"available": true,"total_capacity": 3000,"type": "On-campus (Boys/Girls) - Vegetarian only"},"library_details": {"total_books": 60000,"journals": 150,"e_resources": 5000,"area_sqft": 40000.0},"transport_details": {"buses": 15,"routes": 15},"scholarships": [{"name": "Mahatma Gandhi Merit Scholarship (MGS)","amount": 10000.0,"currency_type": "INR","eligibility": "Top 10% achievers from each class (academic, sports, NCC)","provider": "Kumaraguru Institutions","type": "merit","application_deadline": "NA"},{"name": "Achiever's Award","amount": null,"currency_type": "INR","eligibility": "Excellence in multiple domains (academics, research, leadership)","provider": "Kumaraguru Institutions","type": "merit","application_deadline": "NA"},{"name": "Centum Score Tuition Fee Waiver","amount": null,"currency_type": "INR","eligibility": "Centum in Mathematics in qualifying exam for first-year students","provider": "Kumaraguru Institutions","type": "merit","application_deadline": "NA"},{"name": "Rural Student Scholarship","amount": null,"currency_type": "INR","eligibility": "Toppers from rural schools, cut-off >180/200","provider": "Kumaraguru Institutions","type": "need/merit","application_deadline": "NA"},{"name": "SAKSHAM Scholarship","amount": null,"currency_type": "INR","eligibility": "Differently-abled students","provider": "AICTE","type": "specific","application_deadline": "NA"},{"name": "PRAGATI Scholarship","amount": null,"currency_type": "INR","eligibility": "Girl students","provider": "AICTE","type": "specific","application_deadline": "NA"},{"name": "BC/MBC Scholarship","amount": 8300.0,"currency_type": "INR","eligibility": "Backward Classes/Most Backward Classes students (Hostellers)","provider": "Tamil Nadu Government","type": "need","application_deadline": "NA"}]}
